mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
AND approval_status = #{approvalStatus}
ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'OPEN' THEN 1 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 2 WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN 3 END, ad_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN start_datetime >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, start_datetime ASC
ORDER BY end_datetime ASC
ORDER BY total_budget DESC
ORDER BY approved_at DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'OPEN' THEN 1 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 2 WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN 3 END, ad_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN start_datetime >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, start_datetime ASC
ORDER BY end_datetime ASC
ORDER BY total_budget DESC
ORDER BY ad_id DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'

SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
AND approval_status = 'WAITING'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN start_datetime >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, start_datetime ASC
ORDER BY total_budget DESC
ORDER BY ad_id DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'WAITING'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
SELECT * FROM advertisements WHERE ad_id = #{adId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_advertisements.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO advertisements ( ad_id, title, content, landing_url, target_age_min, target_age_max, target_gender, device_type, ad_channel, start_datetime, end_datetime, advertiser_id, total_budget, ad_grade, priority_score ) VALUES ( #{adId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{landingUrl}, #{targetAgeMin}, #{targetAgeMax}, #{targetGender}, #{deviceType}, #{adChannel}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{advertiserId}, #{totalBudget}, #{adGrade},
CASE WHEN #{adGrade} = 'PREMIUM' THEN 5 ELSE 1 END )

SELECT seq_advertisement_images.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO advertisement_images ( image_id, ad_id, image_url, image_type ) VALUES ( #{imageId}, #{adId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageType} )
mapper.select: SELECT image_id, ad_id, image_type AS imageType, image_url FROM advertisement_images WHERE ad_id = #{adId} ORDER BY image_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE advertisements SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, landing_url = #{landingUrl}, target_age_min = #{targetAgeMin}, target_age_max = #{targetAgeMax}, target_gender = #{targetGender}, device_type = #{deviceType}, ad_channel = #{adChannel}, start_datetime = #{startDatetime}, end_datetime = #{endDatetime}, total_budget = #{totalBudget},
status = 'PENDING', approval_status = 'WAITING', approved_by = NULL, approved_at = NULL, reject_reason = NULL,
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE ad_id = #{adId} AND advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
UPDATE advertisements SET delete_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

UPDATE advertisements SET approval_status = 'APPROVED', status = 'PENDING', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, reject_reason = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

UPDATE advertisements SET approval_status = 'REJECTED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NULL, reject_reason = #{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
UPDATE advertisements SET status = #{status}, status_updated_by = #{statusUpdatedBy}, status_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

UPDATE advertisements SET status = 'OPEN' WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND status = 'PENDING' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP BETWEEN start_datetime AND end_datetime AND status != 'OPEN'
UPDATE advertisements SET status = 'CLOSED' WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP >= end_datetime AND status != 'CLOSED'
UPDATE advertisements SET start_datetime = #{start}, end_datetime = #{end}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE ad_id = #{adId}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, ai.image_id, ai.image_type, ai.image_url
FROM advertisements a
INNER JOIN advertisement_images ai ON a.ad_id = ai.ad_id AND ai.image_type = #{position}
WHERE a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND a.status = 'OPEN' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP BETWEEN a.start_datetime AND a.end_datetime ORDER BY ( a.priority_score - NVL( ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) >= 20 THEN 5 WHEN COUNT(*) >= 10 THEN 3 WHEN COUNT(*) >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FROM advertisement_impression_log ail
WHERE ail.ad_id = a.ad_id
AND ail.viewed_at >= SYSDATE - 1
AND ( ail.member_id = #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OR ( #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} IS NULL AND ail.session_id = #{sessionId} ) )
),0 ) ) DESC, DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED'
mapper.update:
UPDATE advertisements SET ad_grade = #{adGrade}, priority_score = CASE WHEN #{adGrade}='PREMIUM' THEN 5 ELSE 1 END, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE ad_id = #{adId}

UPDATE advertisements
SET priority_score = CASE
WHEN ad_grade = 'PREMIUM' THEN LEAST(
5 + CASE WHEN impressions >= 100 AND (clicks * 100.0 / DECODE(impressions, 0, 1, impressions)) >= 5 THEN 3
WHEN impressions >= 100 AND (clicks * 100.0 / DECODE(impressions, 0, 1, impressions)) >= 3 THEN 2
WHEN impressions >= 100 AND (clicks * 100.0 / DECODE(impressions, 0, 1, impressions)) >= 1 THEN 1
ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN clicks >= 1000 THEN 2 WHEN clicks >= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
,10)
ELSE LEAST(
1 + CASE WHEN impressions >= 100 AND (clicks * 100.0 / DECODE(impressions, 0, 1, impressions)) >= 5 THEN 3
WHEN impressions >= 100 AND (clicks * 100.0 / DECODE(impressions, 0, 1, impressions)) >= 3 THEN 2
WHEN impressions >= 100 AND (clicks * 100.0 / DECODE(impressions, 0, 1, impressions)) >= 1 THEN 1
ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN clicks >= 1000 THEN 2 WHEN clicks >= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
,6)
END
WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND status = 'OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND status = 'CLOSED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO advertisement_click_log ( click_id, ad_id, member_id, device_type, ip_address, session_id, referrer, position ) VALUES ( seq_advertisement_click.NEXTVAL, #{adId}, #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deviceType}, #{ipAddress}, #{sessionId}, #{referrer}, #{position} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM point_history WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND point_reason = 'ADVERTISEMENT_CLICK' AND created_at >= SYSDATE - (1/24)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history ( history_id, member_id, point_pm, point_type, point_reason ) VALUES ( history_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, 10, 'EARN', 'ADVERTISEMENT_CLICK' )

INSERT INTO advertisement_impression_log ( impression_id, ad_id, member_id, device_type, ip_address, session_id, position ) VALUES ( seq_advertisement_impression.NEXTVAL, #{adId}, #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deviceType}, #{ipAddress}, #{sessionId}, #{position} )

INSERT INTO advertisement_daily_statistics ( stat_id, ad_id, stat_date, impressions, clicks, ctr, fatigue_score )
SELECT seq_advertisement_statistics.NEXTVAL, a.ad_id, TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1,
NVL(i.impressions,0),
NVL(c.clicks,0),
NVL( ROUND( NVL(c.clicks,0) / NULLIF(i.impressions,0) *100 ,2) ,0),
CASE WHEN NVL(i.impressions,0) >= 10000 AND ROUND( NVL(c.clicks,0) / NULLIF(i.impressions,0) *100 ,2) < 1 THEN 80
WHEN NVL(i.impressions,0) >= 5000 AND ROUND( NVL(c.clicks,0) / NULLIF(i.impressions,0) *100 ,2) < 3 THEN 50
ELSE 10 END
FROM advertisements a
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ad_id, COUNT(*) impressions
FROM advertisement_impression_log
WHERE viewed_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1 AND viewed_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
GROUP BY ad_id
) i
ON a.ad_id = i.ad_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ad_id, COUNT(*) clicks
FROM advertisement_click_log
WHERE clicked_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1 AND clicked_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
GROUP BY ad_id
) c
ON a.ad_id = c.ad_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM advertisement_daily_statistics s WHERE s.ad_id = a.ad_id AND s.stat_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1 )
mapper.select: WITH today AS ( SELECT SUM(impressions) imp, SUM(clicks) click FROM advertisement_daily_statistics WHERE stat_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1 ), yesterday AS ( SELECT SUM(impressions) imp, SUM(clicks) click FROM advertisement_daily_statistics WHERE stat_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)-2 ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisements) totalAd, today.imp totalImp, today.click totalClick, ROUND(today.click / NULLIF(today.imp,0) *100,2) avgCtr, ROUND((today.imp-yesterday.imp) /NULLIF(yesterday.imp,0)*100,2) impChange, ROUND((today.click-yesterday.click) /NULLIF(yesterday.click,0)*100,2) clickChange, ROUND( (today.click/NULLIF(today.imp,0)*100) - (yesterday.click/NULLIF(yesterday.imp,0)*100) ,2) ctrChange FROM today,yesterday

SELECT TO_CHAR(stat_date,'MM-DD') AS statDate, SUM(impressions) AS impressions, SUM(clicks) AS clicks FROM advertisement_daily_statistics WHERE stat_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)-7
GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.ad_id, a.title, COUNT(DISTINCT c.click_id) AS click_count, COUNT(DISTINCT i.impression_id) AS impression_count, ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT c.click_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.impression_id),0) *100 ,2) AS ctr FROM advertisements a
LEFT JOIN advertisement_impression_log i ON a.ad_id = i.ad_id AND i.position IS NOT NULL LEFT JOIN advertisement_click_log c ON a.ad_id = c.ad_id GROUP BY a.ad_id, a.title HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT i.impression_id) >= 10
ORDER BY ctr DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT ad_grade, COUNT(*) count FROM advertisements GROUP BY ad_grade ORDER BY ad_grade
SELECT ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN extension_status='APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) * 100 ,2) FROM advertisements WHERE delete_yn='N'
SELECT position, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM advertisement_impression_log WHERE position IS NOT NULL GROUP BY position

SELECT i.position, i.impressions, NVL(c.clicks, 0) AS clicks, ROUND( NVL(c.clicks, 0) / NULLIF(i.impressions, 0) * 100 , 2) AS ctr FROM ( SELECT position, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM advertisement_impression_log WHERE position IS NOT NULL GROUP BY position ) i LEFT JOIN ( SELECT position, COUNT(*) AS clicks FROM advertisement_click_log WHERE position IS NOT NULL GROUP BY position ) c ON i.position = c.position

SELECT a.ad_id, a.title, /* 총 노출 */ ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_impression_log i WHERE i.ad_id = a.ad_id ) AS impressions, /* 총 클릭 */ ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_click_log c WHERE c.ad_id = a.ad_id ) AS clicks, /* 전채 CTR */ ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_click_log c WHERE c.ad_id = a.ad_id ) / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_impression_log i WHERE i.ad_id = a.ad_id ), 0) *100,2) AS ctr, /* 최근 7일 CTR */ ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_click_log c WHERE c.ad_id = a.ad_id AND c.clicked_at >= SYSDATE - 7 ) / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_impression_log i WHERE i.ad_id = a.ad_id AND i.viewed_at >= SYSDATE - 7 ), 0) * 100, 2 ) AS recentCtr, /* 이전 7일 CTR */ ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_click_log c WHERE c.ad_id = a.ad_id AND c.clicked_at >= SYSDATE - 14 AND c.clicked_at < SYSDATE - 7 ) / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_impression_log i WHERE i.ad_id = a.ad_id AND i.viewed_at >= SYSDATE - 14 AND i.viewed_at < SYSDATE - 7 ), 0 ) * 100, 2 ) AS previousCtr, /* 반복 노출률 */ ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM advertisement_impression_log i WHERE i.ad_id = a.ad_id AND i.viewed_at >= SYSDATE - 14 ) / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT NVL(TO_CHAR(i.member_id), i.session_id)) FROM advertisement_impression_log i WHERE i.ad_id = a.ad_id AND i.viewed_at >= SYSDATE - 14 ), 0 ), 2 ) AS repeatRate FROM advertisements a WHERE a.ad_id = #{adId}

SELECT NVL( ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT c.click_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.impression_id),0) *100 ,2) ,0) FROM advertisement_impression_log i
LEFT JOIN advertisement_click_log c ON i.impression_id = c.impression_id
WHERE i.ad_id=#{adId} AND i.created_at >= SYSDATE-14

SELECT NVL( ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT c.click_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.impression_id),0) *100 ,2) ,0) FROM advertisement_impression_log i
LEFT JOIN advertisement_click_log c ON i.impression_id = c.impression_id
WHERE i.ad_id=#{adId} AND i.created_at BETWEEN SYSDATE-28 AND SYSDATE-14
SELECT ROUND( ( COUNT(*) - COUNT( DISTINCT NVL(TO_CHAR(member_id),ip_address) ) ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) *100 ,2) FROM advertisement_impression_log WHERE ad_id=#{adId}

SELECT a.ad_id, a.title, a.end_datetime, m.nickname AS member_name, m.email FROM advertisements a JOIN members m ON a.advertiser_id = m.member_id WHERE a.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND a.status = 'OPEN' AND a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.reminder_30d_sent = 'N' AND a.extension_status='NONE' AND a.end_datetime > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND a.end_datetime >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + 30) AND a.end_datetime < TRUNC(SYSDATE + 30) + 1

SELECT a.ad_id, a.title, a.end_datetime, m.nickname AS member_name, m.email FROM advertisements a JOIN members m ON a.advertiser_id = m.member_id WHERE a.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND a.status = 'OPEN' AND a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.reminder_14d_sent = 'N' AND a.extension_status='NONE' AND a.end_datetime >= TRUNC(SYSDATE + 14) AND a.end_datetime < TRUNC(SYSDATE + 14) + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisements SET reminder_30d_sent='Y', updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id=#{adId}
UPDATE advertisements SET reminder_14d_sent='Y', updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ad_id=#{adId}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.ad_id, a.title, a.end_datetime, a.extension_request_end_datetime, a.extension_status, a.updated_at, m.nickname, m.email
FROM advertisements a
JOIN members m ON a.advertiser_id = m.member_id
WHERE a.delete_yn='N' AND a.extension_status='WAITING'
ORDER BY a.updated_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE advertisements SET extension_request_end_datetime = #{extensionRequestEndDatetime}, extension_status='WAITING', updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE ad_id=#{adId} AND advertiser_id=#{advertiserId} AND delete_yn='N' AND extension_status='NONE'

UPDATE advertisements
SET end_datetime = extension_request_end_datetime, extension_request_end_datetime=NULL, extension_status='APPROVED', updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE ad_id=#{adId} AND extension_status='WAITING' AND status='OPEN'
